# Loss function optimality

## Review{-}

- Mean square error

## Decision Theory (pp.348~)

- Action space
- Loss function
  - 例
  
- Risk function

  - 例：Binomial risk functions, Risk normal variance
  
## Bayes risk

- Estimator that yields the smallest value of Bayes risk
- Bayes risk of a decision rule
- Posterior expected loss
- 例

## Loss function optimal in hypothesis testing* (pp.400~402)

- 0-1 loss
- Risk of UMP test

## Loss function optimal in interval estimation* (pp.449~451)


## Applications{-}

- Machine learning: see a review here https://arxiv.org/pdf/2504.04242v1

  - E.g., loss function in linear regression: Residual Sum of Squares (RSS) $\rightarrow$ OLS
    - Some methods that numerically find the minimum of a loss function: Newton-Raphson, gradient descent, backpropagation

## Supplementary files{-}

- [Loss function and so forth](6/loss-function-random-sample.pdf)
- [Decision theory](6/decision_theory_slides.pdf)
